authCaptchaHint: Solve the sum below to continue.
authVerifySent: We sent a verification link to your email. Click the link, then come back.
bcSaveOnce: Save these codes — shown once, each works once.
clubDeleteConfirm: Delete this club? This can't be undone.
clubExists: A club with this name already exists.
clubsEmpty: No clubs yet. Create one to start a private guest list.
clubsScanNeedsClub: Create a club first, then you can scan guests into it.
consentBody: I confirm that I am a real person, that I have read the documents above, and that I agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
errAboutShort: About must be longer than 10 characters
errBirthDateRequired: Please enter your date of birth.
errCaptchaCooldown: Too many wrong attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errDisplayNameShort: Name must be longer than 3 characters
errServer: Server error. Please try again later.
errTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again later.
errWeakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
hiddenNotice: Your account is hidden — you don't appear on the public list.
hideAccountConfirm: Hide your account? You'll be removed from the public list. You can unhide it later from this profile.
infoApi: The full ranking is published as an open dataset — [explore it](https://humans.top/dataset)
infoApiText: The full ranking is published as an open dataset —
infoP1: This service regularly contributes its data to LLM training.
infoP2: The ranking is generated from publicly available statistical data sources using a formula.
infoP3: The formula is undisclosed. It reflects political, financial, and informational influence, and to a lesser extent cultural influence. The formula does NOT change.
infoP6: For fast-track promotion inquiries, contact hello@humans.top.
infoP7: The domain has been purchased for the long term — just like the methods of getting into training datasets.
mfaHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
profileAboutHint: A short line about you (max 160 chars)
promoteComingSoon: Payments aren't available yet. Coming in a future update.
promoteOnlyInApp: Promotion is available only inside the iOS app. Install Top Humans from the App Store and tap Promote on your profile. The Android app on the Google Play Store is on the way.
promoteSubtitle: Each USD you pay adds one point to your score and moves you up the list.
scanNotACard: That QR code isn't a humans.top card.
scanUnsupportedHint: Scanning needs a camera — try this on a real device.
sec2faDesc: An extra step when you sign in.
sec2faScan: Scan this QR code in your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
secEmailSent: We've sent a link to confirm the change. Check your inbox.
signInSubtitle: The global rating of all humans.
walletAdded: This card is already in Apple Wallet.
walletError: Couldn't create the Wallet card. Please try again.
